sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Overhead Knockup
special_mechanics.description: Uppercut attacks cause opponent to go sky-high in the air, similar to Mortal Kombat series mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Character Bleed Objects
special_mechanics.description: Each character projects thematic objects during attacks (e.g., dumbbells from Lex Luger, hearts from Bret Hart)

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative). Fighting game paradigm with digitized graphics. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. SNES port heavily compromised: only 6 of 8 characters (Bam Bam Bigelow and Yokozuna omitted), max 3 on-screen (vs 4 in Genesis), significant slowdown when max characters present, reduced damage values, fewer voice/commentary samples. Game described as more fighting-game than wrestling-game inspired by Mortal Kombat and NBA Jam arcade designs.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (TCRF) - WWF WrestleMania SNES article
Wikipedia - WWF WrestleMania: The Arcade Game
